_note: CHAIN-WIDE FORMAT EXAMPLE -- intentionally non-conforming. This file illustrates the chain-specific manifest structure with representative entries from all three themes (coin, dice, rps) and all booster tiers (2x, 3x, 5x). It will NOT pass the § 9 validation rules because: (a) the tokens array covers only 30 of the 600 declared supply entries, (b) token IDs are not sequential, and (c) not all theme option combinations are included. To produce an authoritative manifest, expand the tokens array to include all 600 token entries (IDs 1–600) for all three themes, then store it at deployments/config/ethereum-mainnet/nft-manifest.json. See docs/nft-asset-manifest-spec.md for the complete field reference and validation rules.
descriptionTemplate: A Tricksfor Booster NFT. Stake this NFT to activate a reward boost during gameplay. An unstaked Booster confers no in-game advantage.
